detail: One feed, one file to edit, no clutter. Built to log daily and show finished work in one place.
Quick Ableton sketch, rough mix. Dropped here to keep a record of it.

text: Shipped 呪われた金庫 — a browser RPG.
detail: A short browser RPG built from scratch — dialogue system, inventory, and a puzzle centered on a cursed safe. Deployed on GitHub Pages.

text: Castle in the Sky site: added scroll-driven cloud transitions.
detail: A scroll-driven immersive redesign of the school Ghibli site, inspired by SBS's 'The Boat' — CSS/DOM parallax, scroll-as-playhead, layered cloud transitions.

text: ヒマ — first working prototype of the activity feed.
detail: An Instagram/TikTok-style app where every post is a real, location-tagged activity, with an 'I did this too' credibility mechanic. Built with React Native/Expo.
